facts.claim: ADT bed-occupancy management: 70 rules spanning backend Django ORM + frontend TypeScript UI for bed state, patient assignment, care-pathway aggregation, micro-indicator payloads.
Bed types: manual (operator), automatica (ICU/Tasy), homecare. Tenants: americashealth↔automatica, homecare↔homecare.
Four-pathway care: sepse, ventilacao, sedacao, estabilidade. Each: alerta (VERMELHO|AMARELO|NEUTRO) + assistido flag; bed aggregates VERMELHO>AMARELO>NEUTRO.
Occupancy payload: micro_indicadores (tempo_internacao, VM, noradrenalina, sedacao) + assistencial (BP/temp, RASS/Glasgow, delirium, labs, fluid) + opaque mortalidade_esperada.
70 rules: 59 OK, 6 DISCREPANCY, 5 AMBIGUOUS; 59 NOT_APPLICABLE, 9 UNVERIFIABLE, 1 VERIFIED, 1 DISCREPANCY verdict; 32 validation, 20 care-pathway, 18 workflow rules.
PT-BR vocab: alerta {VERMELHO, AMARELO, NEUTRO}; leito.tipo {manual, automatica, homecare}; presence {Ausente, Presente}; trilha.tipo {prescricao, balanco_hidrico, evolucao}; genero {M, F, O}.

constraints.text: CRITICAL DISCREPANCIES (6 rules): BE/FE micro_indicadores shape mismatch (002); dead context dict + N+1 (008); hardcoded -3h offset (009); static homecare trilhas (036); unbound form (069); array equality (066).
AMBIGUOUS/UNVERIFIABLE: opaque mortalidade_esperada (003); delegated assistido (011); test-bed AND unclear (049); LOS truncation (001); .first() ambiguity (005); cross-db fallback (020).

TYPE INCONSISTENCIES (7): BP string vs numeric labs (004); alerta union vs string (014); RASS number vs string cross-model (004); dashboard 4th level LARANJA contradicts 3-level (014); leito.tipo enums (023, 026); occupacao_id type (053).
MISSING VALIDATION (4): No range bounds RASS/Glasgow/pO2/pCO2/pH (004); data_entrada guard automatica (058); fluid-balance window validation (062); occupacao edge cases (064).

IntensiCare v2 domains: early-warning-scores (RASS/Glasgow/delirium); sepsis (noradrenalina, lactate); respiratory (VM); hemodynamics (BP, vasopressor); neuro-sedation (RASS, sedacao); electrolyte (pH/HCO3/pO2/pCO2); governance (bed-type, permissions); experience (filtering, camera); platform (ADT ETL).

OUT-OF-PARTITION (heavily ref'd): Tasy ETL (021); oracle InfoPaciente (020); trilha_manual/automatica v2/v3 (020); DadosProntuario.verificar_* (002); Mensageiro/Observacao (012); Leito.get_assistido (011/013); camera RTSP creds (010).

load_bearing_rules.what: BP string, labs numeric; no bounds

open_questions: Leito.get_assistido (011) match commented algorithm? Core/models check needed.
Precomputed vinculos (008) intentionally unused or incomplete refactor?
Migrate -3h offset (009) to tz-aware? Safe since Brazil DST abolished 2019.
Static homecare trilhas (036) vs per-patient like automatica?
